ddls:
CREATE TABLE "films" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film */,
  "original_title" TEXT /* Original title of the film */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the film */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the film */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the film in minutes */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the film was released */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the film */,
  "vote_average" REAL /* Average rating of the film */,
  "budget_adj" REAL /* Adjusted budget of the film */,
  "revenue_adj" REAL /* Adjusted revenue of the film */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the film was produced */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the film */,
  "cast" TEXT /* JSON array of cast members and their roles */,
  "production_status" TEXT /* Current status of the film (e.g., pre-production, production, post-production, released) */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the official trailer */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL to the official poster */,
  "synopsis" TEXT /* Brief summary of the film's plot */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline or catchphrase of the film */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Film rating or certification (e.g., PG-13, R) */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDB ID for the film */,
  "tmdb_id" TEXT /* TMDB ID for the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_genres" (
  "film_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film-genre relationship */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_genres_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the production company is based */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the production company */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the production company was founded */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* CEO or head of the production company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_production_companies" (
  "film_company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film-production company relationship */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production company */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the production company in the film (e.g., producer, distributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_production_companies_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_production_companies_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES production_companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., producer, analyst, executive) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the film */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the film was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the film */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production note */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film the note belongs to */,
  "note_title" TEXT /* Title of the production note */,
  "note_content" TEXT /* Content of the production note */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the note */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the note */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the note was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_notes_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing material */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film the material belongs to */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of marketing material (e.g., poster, trailer) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the marketing material */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the marketing material in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the material was uploaded */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL to the thumbnail of the marketing material */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the marketing material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marketing_materials_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revenue_by_region" (
  "revenue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revenue record */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the revenue was generated */,
  "revenue_amount" REAL /* Revenue amount in the local currency */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the revenue amount */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate to USD on the date of revenue */,
  "revenue_date" TEXT /* Date the revenue was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revenue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_by_region_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media" (
  "social_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media record */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform (e.g., Twitter, Facebook) */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date the engagement was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distribution_partners" (
  "partner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distribution partner */,
  "partner_name" TEXT /* Name of the distribution partner */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the partner is based */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the distribution partner */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the distribution partner was founded */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* CEO or head of the distribution partner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("partner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_distribution" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distribution record */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "partner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the distribution partner */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the film is distributed */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the film was released in the region */,
  "distributor_role" TEXT /* Role of the distribution partner (e.g., theatrical, streaming) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_distribution_partner_id FOREIGN KEY ("partner_id") REFERENCES distribution_partners ("partner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_distribution_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)
